questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "SELECT \"Fiscal Year\", SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS total_revenue, SUM(\"Total Product Cost\") AS total_cost, SUM(\"Sales Amount\" - \"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit, (SUM(\"Sales Amount\" - \"Total Product Cost\") / SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct, COUNT(\"SalesOrderLineKey\") AS total_order_lines FROM \"Sales\" JOIN \"Date\" ON \"Sales\".\"OrderDateKey\" = \"Date\".\"DateKey\" GROUP BY \"Fiscal Year\" ORDER BY \"Fiscal Year\" ASC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "SELECT \"Channel\", SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS total_revenue, (SUM(\"Sales Amount\") / (SELECT SUM(\"Sales Amount\") FROM \"Sales_Order\")) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT \"Sales Order\") AS total_orders, COUNT(\"SalesOrderLineKey\") AS order_lines, AVG(\"Extended Amount\") AS avg_line_amount, ((SUM(\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(\"Total Product Cost\")) / SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct FROM \"Sales_Order\" JOIN \"Sales\" ON \"Sales_Order\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = \"Sales\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" GROUP BY \"Channel\" ORDER BY total_revenue DESC"}

List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql":"SELECT \"Product\", \"Category\", \"Subcategory\", SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS revenue, SUM(\"Order Quantity\") AS units_sold, SUM(\"Sales Amount\" - \"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit, (SUM(\"Sales Amount\" - \"Total Product Cost\") / SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM \"Sales\" JOIN \"Product\" ON \"Sales\".\"ProductKey\" = \"Product\".\"ProductKey\" GROUP BY \"Product\", \"Category\", \"Subcategory\" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10"}

List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql":"SELECT \"Customer\", \"City\", \"State-Province\", \"Country-Region\", COUNT(\"SalesOrderLineKey\") AS total_orders, COUNT(\"ProductKey\") AS total_line_items, SUM(\"Order Quantity\") AS total_units, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(\"Sales Amount\" - \"Total Product Cost\") AS lifetime_profit FROM \"Sales\" JOIN \"Customer\" ON \"Sales\".\"CustomerKey\" = \"Customer\".\"CustomerKey\" WHERE \"CustomerKey\" != -1 GROUP BY \"Customer\", \"City\", \"State-Province\", \"Country-Region\" ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC LIMIT 15"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "SELECT \"Business Type\", COUNT(\"ResellerKey\") AS reseller_count, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS total_revenue, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") / COUNT(\"ResellerKey\") AS revenue_per_reseller, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(\"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit, (SUM(\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(\"Total Product Cost\")) / SUM(\"Sales Amount\") * 100 AS margin_pct FROM \"Reseller\" JOIN \"Sales\" ON \"Reseller\".\"ResellerKey\" = \"Sales\".\"ResellerKey\" JOIN \"Sales_Order\" ON \"Sales\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = \"Sales_Order\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" WHERE \"Channel\" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY \"Business Type\" ORDER BY total_revenue DESC"}

function.arguments: {"sql": "WITH revenue AS (SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Year\", SUM(T4.\"Sales Amount\") AS revenue FROM \"Sales_Order\" T1 INNER JOIN \"Product\" T2 ON T1.\"ProductKey\" = T2.\"ProductKey\" INNER JOIN \"Date\" T3 ON T1.\"OrderDateKey\" = T3.\"DateKey\" INNER JOIN \"Sales\" T4 ON T1.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = T4.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" GROUP BY T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Year\") SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T1.\"Category\", T1.\"Fiscal Year\" AS prior_year, T1.revenue AS prior_revenue, T2.\"Fiscal Year\" AS current_year, T2.revenue AS current_revenue, ((T2.revenue - T1.revenue) / T1.revenue) * 100 AS yoy_growth_pct FROM revenue T1 INNER JOIN revenue T2 ON T1.\"Channel\" = T2.\"Channel\" AND T1.\"Category\" = T2.\"Category\" AND T1.\"Fiscal Year\" + 1 = T2.\"Fiscal Year\" ORDER BY T1.\"Channel\", T1.\"Category\", T1.\"Fiscal Year\" ASC"}

questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "WITH revenue AS (SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Year\", SUM(T4.\"Sales Amount\") AS revenue FROM \"Sales_Order\" T1 INNER JOIN \"Sales\" T4 ON T1.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = T4.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" INNER JOIN \"Product\" T2 ON T4.\"ProductKey\" = T2.\"ProductKey\" INNER JOIN \"Date\" T3 ON T4.\"OrderDateKey\" = T3.\"DateKey\" GROUP BY T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Year\") SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T1.\"Category\", T1.\"Fiscal Year\" AS prior_year, T1.revenue AS prior_revenue, T2.\"Fiscal Year\" AS current_year, T2.revenue AS current_revenue, ((T2.revenue - T1.revenue) / T1.revenue) * 100 AS yoy_growth_pct FROM revenue T1 INNER JOIN revenue T2 ON T1.\"Channel\" = T2.\"Channel\" AND T1.\"Category\" = T2.\"Category\" AND CAST(T1.\"Fiscal Year\" AS INTEGER) + 1 = CAST(T2.\"Fiscal Year\" AS INTEGER) ORDER BY T1.\"Channel\", T1.\"Category\", T1.\"Fiscal Year\" ASC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") AS total_revenue, SUM(T3.\"Order Quantity\") AS units_sold, SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") / SUM(T3.\"Order Quantity\") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(T2.\"List Price\") AS avg_list_price, 1 - (SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") / (SUM(T3.\"Order Quantity\") * AVG(T2.\"List Price\"))) AS realized_discount_pct, SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(T3.\"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit, (SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(T3.\"Total Product Cost\")) / SUM(T3.\"Sales Amount\") AS margin_pct FROM \"Sales_Order\" AS T1 INNER JOIN \"Product\" AS T2 ON T1.\"ProductKey\" = T2.\"ProductKey\" INNER JOIN \"Sales\" AS T3 ON T1.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = T3.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" GROUP BY T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\" ORDER BY T1.\"Channel\" ASC, total_revenue DESC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "WITH revenue AS (SELECT T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Quarter\" AS quarter, SUM(T4.\"Sales Amount\") AS revenue, T3.\"Fiscal Year\" AS year FROM \"Sales_Order\" AS T1 INNER JOIN \"Product\" AS T2 ON T1.\"ProductKey\" = T2.\"ProductKey\" INNER JOIN \"Date\" AS T3 ON T1.\"OrderDateKey\" = T3.\"DateKey\" INNER JOIN \"Sales\" AS T4 ON T1.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = T4.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" GROUP BY T1.\"Channel\", T2.\"Category\", T3.\"Fiscal Quarter\", T3.\"Fiscal Year\"), prior_quarter_revenue AS (SELECT \"Channel\", \"Category\", \"Fiscal Quarter\" AS prior_quarter, LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY \"Channel\", \"Category\" ORDER BY year, quarter) AS prior_revenue, revenue AS current_revenue, \"Fiscal Quarter\" AS current_quarter FROM revenue) SELECT \"Channel\", \"Category\", prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, ROUND(((current_revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100, 2) AS qoq_growth_pct FROM prior_quarter_revenue WHERE prior_revenue IS NOT NULL ORDER BY \"Channel\", \"Category\", prior_quarter ASC;"}

```python
{"type": "function", "name": "run_sql_query", "parameters": {"sql": "SELECT \"Channel\", \"Category\", SUM(\"Sales Amount\") AS revenue, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") / SUM(SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) OVER (PARTITION BY \"Channel\") AS channel_revenue_share_pct, SUM(SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) OVER (PARTITION BY \"Channel\" ORDER BY SUM(\"Sales Amount\") DESC) / SUM(SUM(\"Sales Amount\")) OVER (PARTITION BY \"Channel\") AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT \"Sales Order\") AS orders, SUM(\"Sales Amount\") - SUM(\"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit FROM \"Sales_Order\" JOIN \"Sales\" ON \"Sales_Order\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = \"Sales\".\"SalesOrderLineKey\" JOIN \"Product\" ON \"Sales\".\"ProductKey\" = \"Product\".\"ProductKey\" GROUP BY \"Channel\", \"Category\" ORDER BY \"Channel\" ASC, revenue DESC, \"Category\" ASC"}}```

questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

message.content:
```python
{"type": "function", "name": "run_sql_query", "parameters": {"sql": "WITH channel_revenue AS (SELECT T1.`Group`, T2.`Fiscal Year`, T4.Channel, SUM(T3.`Sales Amount`) AS revenue FROM `Sales_Territory` AS T1 INNER JOIN `Date` AS T2 ON T1.`SalesTerritoryKey` = T3.`SalesTerritoryKey` INNER JOIN `Sales` AS T3 ON T2.`DateKey` = T3.`OrderDateKey` INNER JOIN `Sales_Order` AS T4 ON T3.`SalesOrderLineKey` = T4.`SalesOrderLineKey` GROUP BY T1.`Group`, T2.`Fiscal Year`, T4.Channel), top_channel AS (SELECT `Group`, `Fiscal Year`, Channel AS top_channel, revenue AS channel_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY `Group`, `Fiscal Year` ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS row_num FROM channel_revenue), group_year_revenue AS (SELECT `Group`, `Fiscal Year`, SUM(revenue) AS group_year_revenue FROM channel_revenue GROUP BY `Group`, `Fiscal Year`) SELECT T1.`Group`, T1.`Fiscal Year`, T1.top_channel, T1.channel_revenue, T2.group_year_revenue, (T1.channel_revenue / T2.group_year_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct FROM top_channel AS T1 INNER JOIN group_year_revenue AS T2 ON T1.`Group` = T2.`Group` AND T1.`Fiscal Year` = T2.`Fiscal Year` WHERE T1.row_num = 1 ORDER BY T1.`Group`, T1.`Fiscal Year` ASC"}}```

  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Territory":
